title: anathallis heterophylla
intro: Anathallis heterophylla, also known as the "Anathallis heterophylla" or " False orchid," is a species of orchid native to Brazil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anathallis heterophylla are said to include treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin infections, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in aromatherapy due to its fragrant flowers.
